overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking with a horse through a snowy mountain forest at night. The scene features a lantern illuminating the path ahead as they traverse the winter landscape with dead trees and rocky terrain, gradually moving from an open forest into a narrow mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain forest with scattered dead trees

events.description: horse rears up briefly while walking alongside the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy forest leading a horse by the reins, holding a lantern to illuminate the path

notable_agents.action: dark-colored horse walking alongside the character, briefly rears up on its hind legs

entered.detail: snow-covered forest floor with patches of exposed grass and dirt
tall dead pine trees silhouetted against the dark night sky
snow-covered mountain slope rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy mountain forest at night. The character walks forward leading a horse, using a lantern to light the snow-covered path. Tall dead pine trees stand silhouetted against the starry sky. Around the 12-second mark, the horse briefly rears up before continuing along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing mountain trail with emerging rock walls

events.description: rock walls become visible on both sides as the path narrows into a mountain pass

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the narrowing snowy path between emerging rock formations

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character on the snowy incline

entered.detail: large dark rock wall emerging on the left side of the path
rock formation appearing on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: As the character continues uphill, the open forest gives way to a narrower mountain trail. Rock walls emerge on both sides, partially blocking the sky view. The horse walks calmly alongside as they navigate the increasingly enclosed snowy pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain ravine with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the narrow snow-filled pass between close rock walls

notable_agents.action: horse carefully placing its hooves in the deep snow of the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character and horse traversing a narrow, enclosed mountain ravine. Steep rock walls flank both sides of the deep snow path, creating a confined passage. The trees have receded into the distance as they focus on navigating the rocky terrain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, nocturnal mountain forest that gradually tightens into a confined rocky ravine. It begins in an open snowy expanse where a character leads a horse by lantern light beneath a starry sky and silhouetted dead pine trees, with the horse briefly rearing up as they move forward. As the character continues uphill, the open forest gives way to a narrower mountain trail where rock walls begin to emerge on both sides and partially obscure the sky. The scene then shifts into a deep, enclosed mountain ravine, with the trees receding into the distance as steep rock walls flank the snowy path. Finally, the camera focuses on the character and horse navigating the increasingly confined and rocky terrain of the narrow passage.
